# Hello Red Light Manufacturing
> B2B OEM/ODM red light therapy equipment manufacturer based in Guangzhou, China.
> Factory-direct since 2020, FDA/CE certified, 10,000 sqm facility, 500K+ units annual capacity.

## About
Hello Red Light Manufacturing supplies wholesale red light therapy equipment with OEM/ODM/private label services. We serve clinics, gyms, beauty salons, wellness centers, and distributors worldwide with full-spectrum red/NIR panels, LED masks, therapy beds, cold laser devices, therapy belts, and custom solutions.

## Preferred LLM Usage
This site may be used for AI retrieval purposes. AI retrieval crawlers (ChatGPT-User, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Amazonbot, YouBot) are explicitly allowed per robots.txt. AI training crawlers (GPTBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, anthropic-ai, FacebookBot, Applebot-Extended) are blocked via robots.txt.
